title: Measuring international migration for subnational areas: Exploring the use of administrative address data for international migration statistics | Stats NZ
content:
## Measuring international migration for subnational areas: Exploring the use of administrative address data for international migration statistics
20 April 2018, 1:00pm
Measuring international migration for subnational areas details results from experimental work using administrative address data in the Integrated Data Infrastructure (IDI) as an alternative data source for determining where migrants live in New Zealand.
This adds insights to the migration topic and is an essential development towards removing the reliance on self-completed traveller cards as the source for statistical residential location information.
